title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 27–30, this part focuses on Unknown person #24, Unknown person #25, Unknown person #26, Unknown person #27 as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: time to meet your end of the deal. Clear this table.

dialogue.text: H- How dare you get impudent with me, brat?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I CAN'T... I CAN'T THINK OF ANYTHING BESIDES THIS DISH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It cuts through the veneers of the money-riddled, frame-seeking

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I feel like I'm being reborn, bite by bite! I'd liken this flavor to...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Something that gives those that eat it new- found power... something that changes their very being...

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 12 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
